description.ko: 생물학적 진화와 디지털 기술이 하나의 생명체로 통합된 미래의 비전으로, 실리콘 기반 생명체의 초현실적인 아름다움을 보여줍니다.
description.en: A vision of a future where biological evolution and digital technology have merged into a single living entity, showcasing the surreal beauty of silicon-based life forms.

prompt: FLORA-9 digital nature aesthetic, a hyper-realistic cybernetic forest where trees are composed of glowing fiber-optic cables and translucent crystalline leaves, bioluminescent moss spreading over integrated circuit-board soil, iridescent data particles floating in the atmosphere, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, vibrant neon teal and violet color palette, intricate organic-mechanical fusion.
